features.name: multiple_instances_domain_cross_dependency
features.description: Code should include multiple module instances in the same parent where a clock or domain signal from one instance flows into another instance via internal wires, creating a cross-instance dependency that affects pass ordering.

features.name: output_port_domain_annotation
features.description: Code should include an output port carrying a domain or clocking annotation that is referenced by name to tag another port, establishing a dependency between the port declaration and its use as a domain qualifier.

features.name: internal_wire_domain_feedback
features.description: Code should include internal wires that connect instance output ports to other instance input ports in a cyclic manner, causing the domain inference pass to revisit or reorder definitions.

features.name: domain_declaration_inst_use_before_def
features.description: Code should include a named domain declaration and multiple instantiations where source order places an instance whose inferred domain depends on a later instance, triggering a use-before-def error during a domain inference pass.
